sentences.arabic: يُشَارِكُ الشَّبَابُ فِي أَعْمَالٍ تَطَوُّعِيَّةٍ لِمُسَاعَدَةِ الفُقَرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Mladi učestvuju u volonterskom radu kako bi pomogli siromašnima.
sentences.translationEn: Young people participate in voluntary work to help the poor.

sentences.arabic: يَقُومُ المُتَطَوِّعُونَ بِتَوْزِيعِ الطَّعَامِ وَالمَلَابِسِ فِي الشِّتَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Volonteri dijele hranu i odjeću tokom zime.
sentences.translationEn: Volunteers distribute food and clothing during winter.

sentences.arabic: تُنَظِّمُ الجَمْعِيَّاتُ الخَيْرِيَّةُ دَوْرَاتٍ تَعْلِيمِيَّةً لِلأَطْفَالِ.
sentences.translation: Dobrotvorna udruženja organizuju obrazovne kurseve za djecu.
sentences.translationEn: Charitable associations organize educational courses for children.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ النَّاسُ بِالسَّعَادَةِ عِنْدَمَا يَعْمَلُونَ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Ljudi se osjećaju sretno kada rade zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: People feel happy when they work together.

sentences.arabic: بِنَاءُ المُجْتَمَعِ القَوِيِّ يَبْدَأُ بِمُسَاعَدَةِ الآخَرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Izgradnja jakog društva počinje pomaganjem drugima.
sentences.translationEn: Building a strong community starts with helping others.
